name: R-14 (SS-91)
events: This page was last updated in September 2016.

10 May 1921 During a search for the sea-going tug Conestoga in May 1921, R-14 ran out of fuel southeast of Hawaii. Sails were made from blankets and mattresses, and the submarine arrived at Hilo, Hawaii on 15 May after 5 days under sail. (1)
